_devmode.note: Beads = persistent memory + dependency graph for the devmode flow. Notes survive conversation compaction; the design concept and ubiquitous-language updates should be written into bd notes at handoff so a fresh session can recover them.
_devmode.mode_help: stealth = .beads/ is gitignored (personal use on shared repos). normal = .beads/ committed (whole team uses Beads).
_devmode.requires: bd CLI installed. bd >= 1.0 uses embedded Dolt by default (no server); only --server mode needs an external dolt sql-server. Verified on bd 1.0.3.
